    teaching

    Deriv BeSquare Program - DevOps Engineering Module (Batch 1)

    Mentorship, Deriv, 2021

    Trained and mentored the first batch of fresh graduates on DevOps Engineering as part of Deriv’s BeSquare program. Covered hands-on topics like CI/CD, infrastructure automation, and deployment workflows to help them build practical skills for the industry.

    Deriv BeSquare Program - DevOps Engineering Module (Batch 2)

    Mentorship, Deriv, 2023

    Returned as a co-mentor for the second batch of the Deriv BeSquare program, guiding participants on DevOps Engineering concepts and preparing assessment questions to evaluate their progress.
